_comment: Current operational thresholds for each AML rule. Edit this file when rules change — no Python code changes needed.

activity deviation (ach).current_condition: Monthly Outgoing ACH >= $50K AND >= 5 std dev above 12-month profile mean

activity deviation (check).current_condition: Monthly Outgoing Check >= $50K AND >= 2 std dev above 12-month profile mean

elder abuse.current_condition: Age >= 60 AND 14-day outgoing >= $5K AND >= 3 std dev above 90-day mean

velocity single.current_condition: >=1 pair (in+out) within 14 days, out=90-110% of in, pair total >= $20K

structuring (incoming cash).current_condition: 3 qualifying days within 14-day window, each day's Cash CashIn total $3K-$40K

structuring (outgoing cash).current_condition: 3 qualifying days within 14-day window, each day's Cash CashOut total $7K-$30K

burst in originator activity.current_condition: 5-day Incoming Wire/ACH sum >= $5K, >= 3 transactions, >= 2 distinct counterparties

burst in beneficiary activity.current_condition: 5-day Outgoing Wire/ACH sum >= $5K, >= 3 transactions, >= 2 distinct counterparties

risky international transfer.current_condition: Single Wire to/from medium-risk country >= $300K or >= $500K
